channel.title: INtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Is Alexa+ So Bad?
item.description: I stuck Amazon’s Echo Show 15 and its Alexa+ AI assistant in my kitchen for a month. Things have not gone well.

item.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most An...

item.title: Posture Correctors That Will Straighten You Out (2026)
item.description: You’re hunched over your desk and phone for hours. I rounded up gadgets, a DIY trick, and even some yoga advice to help you straighten up.

item.title: From Ukraine to Iran, Hacking Security Cameras Is Now Part of War’s ‘Playbook’
item.description: New research shows hundreds of attempts by apparent Iranian state hackers to hijack consumer-grade cameras, timed to missile and drone strikes. Israel...

item.title: 7 Laptop Docking Stations to Unlock the Full Desktop Experience (2026)
item.description: Laptop docking stations expand what your laptop can do, and I’ve been testing the best of the best to see which you should buy.

item.title: The Smart Bird Feeders Everyone’s Talking About (and Actually Buying) (2026)
item.description: These bird feeders come with cameras and connected apps to let you see and learn about the birds in your neighborhood.

item.title: FBI investigating hack on its wiretap and surveillance systems: Report
item.description: Hackers allegedly broke into the FBI’s networks, according to a report by CNN.

item.title: AWS launches a new AI agent platform specifically for healthcare
item.description: AWS is launching Amazon Connect Health, an AI agent platform that will help with patient scheduling, documentation, and patient verification.

item.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
item.description: The $7 million in annual recurring revenue that Cluely CEO Roy Lee shared last summer was a lie, its founder and CEO Roy Lee admitted on Thursday on X...

item.title: DiligenceSquared uses AI, voice agents to make M&A research affordable
item.description: Instead of relying on expensive management consultants, the startup uses AI voice agents to conduct interviews with customers of the companies the PE ...
